name: Leonin Features
summary: Ability Score Increase.Your Constitution score increases by 2, and your Strength score increases by 1.
bonuses: Ability Score Increase.Your Constitution score increases by 2, and your Strength score increases by 1.
Age.Leonin mature and age at about the same rate as humans.
Alignment.Leonin tend toward good alignments. Leonin who are focused on the pride lean toward lawful good.
Size.Leonin are typically over 6 feet tall, with some standing over 7 feet. Your size is Medium.
Speed.Your base walking speed is 35 feet.

traits.name: Age
traits.summary: Leonin mature and age at about the same rate as humans.

traits.name: Alignment
traits.summary: Leonin tend toward good alignments. Leonin who are focused on the pride lean toward lawful good.

traits.name: Darkvision
traits.summary: You can see in dim light within 60 feet of you as if it were bright light and in darkness as if it were dim light. You can’t discern color in darkness, only shades of gray.

traits.name: Claws
traits.summary: Your claws are natural weapons, which you can use to make unarmed strikes. If you hit with them, you can deal slashing damage equal to 1d4 + your Strength modifier.

traits.name: Hunter's Instincts
traits.summary: You have proficiency in one of the following skills of your choice: Athletics, Intimidation, Perception, or Survival.

traits.name: Daunting Roar
traits.summary: As a bonus action, you can let out an especially menacing roar. Creatures of your choice within 10 feet of you that can hear you must succeed on a Wisdom saving throw or become frightened of you until the end of your next turn. The DC of the save equals 8 + your proficiency bonus + your Constitution modifier. Once you use this trait, you can't use it again until you finish a short or long rest.

stats.label: Ability Score Increase
stats.value: Your Constitution score increases by 2, and your Strength score increases by 1.

stats.label: Size
stats.value: Leonin are typically over 6 feet tall, with some standing over 7 feet. Your size is Medium.

stats.label: Speed
stats.value: Your base walking speed is 35 feet.

stats.label: Languages
stats.value: You can speak, read, and write Common and Leonin.
